name: Catcher
description: Catch targets, avoid traps, and finish on a branded end screen.

assets.label: Background
assets.description: Background shown while the game is being played.

assets.label: Targets
assets.description: Collectible target objects used during gameplay.

assets.label: Bomb
assets.description: Obstacle object the player should avoid.

assets.label: End Background
assets.description: Background shown at the end of the game.

assets.label: Tutorial Hand
assets.description: Hand indicator used to guide the player.

assets.label: Soundtrack
assets.description: Looping background music for the playable.

assets.label: Catch Target Sound
assets.description: Sound effect played when a target is caught.

assets.label: Catch Bomb Sound
assets.description: Sound effect played when an obstacle is caught.

config.label: Canvas Width (px)
config.description: Internal canvas width in game-world pixels. Match this with the creative aspect ratio; gameplay positions, item sizes, and collision coordinates are measured against this width.

config.label: Canvas Height (px)
config.description: Internal canvas height in game-world pixels. Match this with the creative aspect ratio; gameplay positions, item sizes, and collision coordinates are measured against this height.

config.label: Canvas Background Fill
config.description: Hex color shown behind the background image whenever the canvas is visible outside the artwork, such as during viewport cropping or letterboxing.

config.label: Game Duration (seconds)
config.description: Total playable length in seconds. The game ends when this timer reaches zero unless the player reaches the target score first.

config.label: Target Score
config.description: Number of target catches needed to finish early. The HUD displays progress as current score divided by this target score.

config.label: Starting Spawn Interval (ms)
config.description: Initial delay between falling-item spawns, in milliseconds. Lower values make items appear more frequently at the start of the game.

config.label: Fastest Spawn Interval (ms)
config.description: Fastest allowed delay between spawns, in milliseconds, after the difficulty ramp is complete. Lower values create a denser end-game.

config.label: Difficulty Ramp Duration (seconds)
config.description: Time in seconds for spawn rate and item speed to ramp from their starting values to their hardest values.

config.label: Trap Chance
config.description: Probability from 0 to 1 that a newly spawned item is a trap instead of a target. For example, 0.28 means 28% of spawns are traps.

config.label: Maximum Active Falling Items
config.description: Maximum number of falling items that can exist on screen at the same time. Higher values can make the game busier if spawn timing allows it.

config.label: Catcher Width (px)
config.description: Rendered catcher width in game-world pixels. This changes the visible catcher size and affects its default horizontal movement bounds.

config.label: Catcher Height (px)
config.description: Rendered catcher height in game-world pixels. This changes the visible catcher size and its vertical placement near the bottom of the canvas.

config.label: Catcher Bottom Offset (px)
config.description: Distance in game-world pixels from the bottom edge of the canvas to the catcher placement area. Larger values move the catcher upward.

config.label: Catcher Collision Side Inset (px)
config.description: Pixels removed from both left and right sides of the catcher hitbox. Increase this when the transparent or decorative sides catch too generously.

config.label: Catcher Collision Top Inset (px)
config.description: Pixels removed from the top of the catcher hitbox. Use this to align catches with the open area of the basket artwork.

config.label: Catcher Collision Bottom Inset (px)
config.description: Pixels removed from the bottom of the catcher hitbox. Use this to prevent catches from registering below the visible basket.

config.label: Catcher Follow Smoothing
config.description: Pointer-follow smoothing from 0 to 1. Higher values snap toward the pointer faster; lower values make the catcher glide more softly.

config.label: Show Tutorial Hand
config.description: Controls whether the animated hand prompt appears before the player first moves the catcher.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Width (px)
config.description: Rendered tutorial hand width in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Height (px)
config.description: Rendered tutorial hand height in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Y Offset (px)
config.description: Vertical offset in game-world pixels from the catcher center to the tutorial hand center. Larger values place the hand lower.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Move Distance (px)
config.description: Horizontal travel distance in game-world pixels for the tutorial hand swipe animation.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Bob Distance (px)
config.description: Vertical bob distance in game-world pixels added to the tutorial hand animation. Use 0 for a straight horizontal swipe.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Cycle Duration (ms)
config.description: Length of one complete tutorial hand motion cycle, in milliseconds. Larger values make the gesture slower.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Opacity
config.description: Tutorial hand opacity from 0 to 1. Use lower values for a subtler prompt and 1 for fully opaque artwork.

config.label: Feedback Duration (ms)
config.description: How long the catch feedback animation remains visible, in milliseconds, after catching a target or trap.

config.label: Feedback Text Size (px)
config.description: Font size in game-world pixels for the floating +1 or -1 catch feedback text.

config.label: Feedback Text Rise (px)
config.description: Distance in game-world pixels that the +1 or -1 feedback text floats upward during the animation.

config.label: Target Feedback Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the +1 text shown after catching a target.

config.label: Trap Feedback Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the -1 text shown after catching a trap.

config.label: Target Glow Color
config.description: Hex color for the catcher glow shown after catching a target.

config.label: Trap Glow Color
config.description: Hex color for the catcher glow shown after catching a trap.

config.label: Feedback Glow Blur (px)
config.description: Blur radius in game-world pixels for the temporary glow around the catcher after a catch.

config.label: Feedback Ripple Radius (px)
config.description: Starting radius in game-world pixels for the ripple effect centered on the catcher after a catch.

config.label: Target Feedback Sparkles
config.description: Number of sparkle particles emitted around the catcher after a successful target catch.

config.label: Falling Item Size (px)
config.description: Rendered width and height in game-world pixels for both target and trap items.

config.label: Minimum Fall Speed (px/sec)
config.description: Slowest falling speed in game-world pixels per second when an item is spawned.

config.label: Maximum Fall Speed (px/sec)
config.description: Fastest base falling speed in game-world pixels per second before difficulty ramp speed is added.

config.label: Fall Speed Ramp (px/sec)
config.description: Extra falling speed in game-world pixels per second added as difficulty increases over the ramp duration.

config.label: Spawn Top Offset (px)
config.description: Starting Y offset in game-world pixels relative to the top of the canvas. Negative values spawn items above the visible area.

config.label: Horizontal Spawn Padding (px)
config.description: Minimum distance in game-world pixels from the left and right canvas edges where items are allowed to spawn.

config.label: Spawn Rotation Range (degrees)
config.description: Maximum random starting rotation in degrees. Use 0 for upright items; higher values allow more rotated starts.

config.label: Minimum Rotation Speed (deg/sec)
config.description: Minimum item rotation speed in degrees per second. Negative values rotate counter-clockwise.

config.label: Maximum Rotation Speed (deg/sec)
config.description: Maximum item rotation speed in degrees per second. Positive values rotate clockwise.

config.label: Soundtrack Volume
config.description: Background music volume multiplier from 0 to 1. This affects only the looping soundtrack.

config.label: Catch Sound Volume
config.description: Catch sound effect volume multiplier from 0 to 1. This affects target and trap catch sounds.

config.label: HUD Top Offset (CSS px)
config.description: Distance in CSS pixels from the safe-area top of the screen to the top of the HUD.

config.label: HUD Width (vw)
config.description: HUD width as a percentage of viewport width. For example, 84 means the HUD is 84vw until capped by maximum width.

config.label: HUD Maximum Width (CSS px)
config.description: Maximum HUD width in CSS pixels, used to keep the HUD from becoming too wide on larger screens.

config.label: HUD Timer-to-Bar Gap (CSS px)
config.description: Vertical gap in CSS pixels between the timer text and the score progress bar.

config.label: Timer Font Size (CSS px)
config.description: Timer text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: Timer Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the timer text during normal gameplay.

config.label: Low-Time Warning Threshold (seconds)
config.description: Remaining time threshold in seconds when the HUD timer switches to the low-time warning color.

config.label: Low-Time Timer Color
config.description: Hex color for the timer text after the low-time warning threshold is reached.

config.label: Progress Bar Height (CSS px)
config.description: Height of the score progress bar in CSS pixels.

config.label: Progress Bar Border Width (CSS px)
config.description: Border width around the score progress bar in CSS pixels.

config.label: Progress Bar Border Color
config.description: Hex color for the score progress bar border.

config.label: Progress Bar Background Color
config.description: Hex color for the unfilled portion of the score progress bar.

config.label: Progress Bar Fill Color
config.description: Hex color for the filled portion of the score progress bar.

config.label: Progress Label Font Size (CSS px)
config.description: Font size in CSS pixels for the score text displayed inside the progress bar.

config.label: Progress Label Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the score text displayed inside the progress bar.

config.label: End Button Text
config.description: Text shown on the call-to-action button on the end screen.

config.label: End Button Width (CSS px)
config.description: End-screen button width in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Height (CSS px)
config.description: End-screen button height in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Font Size (CSS px)
config.description: End-screen button text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Vertical Position (%)
config.description: Vertical position of the end-screen button center as a percentage of screen height. Lower values place it higher on the screen.

config.label: End Button Background Color
config.description: Hex color for the end-screen call-to-action button background.

config.label: End Button Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the end-screen call-to-action button text.

config.label: End Button Pulse Scale
config.description: Largest scale reached by the repeating button pulse animation. 1 means no size increase; 1.08 means 8% larger at the peak.

config.label: End Button Pulse Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of one full button pulse animation cycle, in milliseconds.
